Function.Inference: The track starts with an accelerating introduction ending with a || at bar 6.
A rhythmic build-up section before the loop, ending with a |: at bar 14.
The main looping section of the track, enclosed by the repeat sign :| at bar 38.

Section.Inference: Second part of the introduction with rhythmic hits.
The first main theme is introduced with a descending slow melody over heavy bass.
The texture changes with a higher register melody and a continuous 16th-note bass accompaniment.
A turnaround section that recalls the rhythmic hits from the intro, leading back to the loop start.
